_comment: L1 row-4 quota-observation mission template. scripts/observe-quota.sh
sets VIGLA_L1_QUOTA_MOCK=1, which enables the hidden
claude_quota_exhausted worker backend for this dry-run only.
The first worker pass emits a Claude-shaped quota signal, the
mission pauses with a countdown, then the resumed pass falls
through to the normal mock worker so the run can complete.
Feed this JSON through the Deploy flow or invoke start_mission
over Tauri IPC from the running app.
title: L1 row-4 quota observation
objective: Append the current ISO-8601 timestamp as a new line at the end of notes/quota-pings.md. If the file or its parent directory does not exist, create them first. Do not touch any other file. Commit the change with the message "quota ping <timestamp>".
